channel.title: Book of Mormon
channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.itunes:summary: Personal feed for Eric Wilde — official chapter-by-chapter audio of the Book of Mormon, streamed from the Church's CDN. Audio © Intellectual Reserve, Inc.; for personal study.
channel.description: Chapter-by-chapter audio of the Book of Mormon, from the official Church CDN. Personal use only.

item.title: Title Page
item.description: Book of Mormon — Title Page. Read aloud from the official audio recording of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
item.itunes:subtitle: Book of Mormon
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Traditional Title Page
item.description: Book of Mormon — Traditional Title Page. Read aloud from the official audio recording of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

item.itunes:subtitle: Book of Mormon
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.itunes:subtitle: Book of Mormon
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
